items.title: I've been in Las Vegas this week for a conference. Stayed at Mandalay Bay, where the Aces play at Michelob Ultra Arena. I found ONE place - inside the Raiders team store - that sold Aces shirts. I had my choice of two different ones. I'm shocked that stuff is not much more availa
items.author: Jon Hamm
items.body_excerpt: I've been in Las Vegas this week for a conference. Stayed at Mandalay Bay, where the Aces play at Michelob Ultra Arena. I found ONE place - inside the Raiders team store - that sold Aces shirts. I had my choice of two different ones. I'm shocked that stuff is not much more available.

items.title: The San Antonio Spurs misfired on 32 of their 43 attempts from three, setting a franchise playoff record and tying an NBA Finals record for most 3-pointers missed in a game. They share the latter mark with the Cavaliers, who missed 32 threes in Game 3 of the 2017 Finals.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
The San Antonio Spurs misfired on 32 of their 43 attempts from three, setting a franchise playoff record and tying an NBA Finals record for most 3-pointers missed in a game. They share the latter mark with the Cavaliers, who missed 32 threes in Game 3 of the 2017 Finals.

(via @statitudes.com)
#NBA

items.title: Russell Wilson was formally announced yesterday.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
Russell Wilson was formally announced yesterday. 

Today: Kyle Long is announced as a studio host for The NFL Today, joining Nate Burleson, Bill Cowher and James Brown. Wilson and Long will also serve as studio analysts on THE NFL TODAY+.

items.title: Josh Hart last night:
items.author: Justin Kubatko
items.body_excerpt:
Josh Hart last night:

✅ 3 PTS
✅ 15 REB
✅ 6 AST
✅ 4 STL

He's the first player to record at least 15 rebounds and five assists while scoring fewer than five points in an NBA Finals game since Wes Unseld in Game 2 of the 1978 Finals.

items.title: The Knicks have outscored their opponents by 272 points over the last 12 games, the largest margin in NBA history over any 12-game span, regular season or playoffs.
items.author: Justin Kubatko
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks have outscored their opponents by 272 points over the last 12 games, the largest margin in NBA history over any 12-game span, regular season or playoffs.

They've won an NBA-record seven straight road playoff games by 10+ points.

items.title: Hollander POTD Xavier McDaniel. 4th pick from Wichita St in 85 by SEA. Put up 17 ppg as rook 20+ ppg thru 89-90. Intimidating physical player, who could dunk hard + defend. Had knee issues but still good for NY & BOS in 1990s. Per bio "mean artificially bald scoring machine."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Xavier McDaniel. 4th pick from Wichita St in 85 by SEA. Put up 17 ppg as rook 20+ ppg thru 89-90. Intimidating physical player, who could dunk hard + defend. Had knee issues but still good for NY & BOS in 1990s. Per bio "mean artificially bald scoring machine."
